title: Java Arrays
summary: A Java array is a collection of variables of the same data type which can be access individually, or traversed one by one. As part of my Java tutorial overhaul, I have given the Java Array tutorial an update too.
content: A Java array is a collection of variables of the same data type which can be access individually, or traversed one by one. As part of my Java tutorial overhaul, I have given the Java Array tutorial an update too.
